channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: 今週は… 🔸塩崎太智のソロ曲はライブで沸きそう 🔸YOASOBI「オリオン」が描く葛藤と希望 🔸BABYMO…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
今週は…
🔸塩崎太智のソロ曲はライブで沸きそう
🔸YOASOBI「オリオン」が描く葛藤と希望
🔸BABYMONSTERが新曲で見せる新境地

詳しくは👇
https://natalie.mu/music/column/681319?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

今盛り上がっている曲について解説する連載
🔭#再生数急上昇ソング定点観測🔭

item.title: Business is booming for Snap-on, a Wisconsin company that ha…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Business is booming for Snap-on, a Wisconsin company that has made tools for professional mechanics for more than a century. It recently got a fact-finding visit from the head of the Chicago Federal Reserve Bank. n.pr/4f5bkI2
item.content:encoded: Business is booming for Snap-on, a Wisconsin company that has made tools for professional mechanics for more than a century. It recently got a fact-finding visit from the head of the Chicago Federal Reserve Bank. n.pr/4f5bkI2

item.title: American-led restrictions have blocked China from accessing …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: American-led restrictions have blocked China from accessing some of the world's most advanced technologies, spurring China's efforts to build its own know-how and intensifying the tech race between the world's two biggest economies. n.pr/4aUff83
item.content:encoded: American-led restrictions have blocked China from accessing some of the world's most advanced technologies, spurring China's efforts to build its own know-how and intensifying the tech race between the world's two biggest economies. n.pr/4aUff83

item.content:encoded:

item.title: A popular princess drives support for having a female Japane…

item.description: A popular princess drives support for having a female Japanese Emperor. But the country's first female prime minister opposes it. n.pr/45cTHju

item.title: New Music Friday | July 17 We're back to showcase new music…
item.author: Record Club (@record.club)
item.description:
New Music Friday | July 17

We're back to showcase new music from Tinashe, Steve Lacy, Mock Media, and more!

Let us know which release you decide to check out first. For a more comprehensive list of releases or to see what the community is saying, head to record.club and join the conversation.
item.content:encoded:
New Music Friday | July 17

We're back to showcase new music from Tinashe, Steve Lacy, Mock Media, and more!

Let us know which release you decide to check out first. For a more comprehensive list of releases or to see what the community is saying, head to record.club and join the conversation.
